system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.baocao_quyettoan_nguyenlieu_hangtrang1","body":"	
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[BAOCAO_QUYETTOAN_NGUYENLIEU_HANGTRANG1]
(
	@dondathang NVARCHAR(200)
)
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @dondathang NVARCHAR(200) = 'DQH-VFM01/0725'
	DECLARE @donhang nvarchar(max);

	SELECT @donhang = donhang 
	FROM tr_dondathang WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE maddh = @dondathang

	SELECT A.item_number, 
		CASE
			WHEN A.fsc_100 = 1 THEN 2
			WHEN A.fsc_mix = 1 THEN 3
			WHEN A.fsc_recycled = 1 THEN 4
			ELSE 1
		END AS fsc_id,
		SUM(order_qty) AS soluong_po
	INTO #DONHANG
	FROM tr_order_detail A WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE A.order_number IN (SELECT RTRIM(LTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.SplitWith_MultiDelimiter(@donhang, ',;'))
		AND A.f_cancelled = 'N'
	GROUP BY A.item_number,
			CASE
				WHEN A.fsc_100 = 1 THEN 2
				WHEN A.fsc_mix = 1 THEN 3
				WHEN A.fsc_recycled = 1 THEN 4
				ELSE 1
			END
	
	SELECT A.maddh, @donhang AS donhang, A.masp, A.masp_khachhang, A.masp_nhamay, A.tensp, B.fsc_id,
		A.m3_tc,
		A.soluong AS soluong_dathang,
		B.soluong_po
	INTO #DONDATHANG
	FROM (
		SELECT A.maddh, A.masp, B.masp_nhamay, B.masp_khachhang, B.tensp, SUM(A.soluong) AS soluong, SUM(DISTINCT B.m3_tc) AS m3_tc
		FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet A
			INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.masp = B.masp
		WHERE A.maddh = @dondathang
		GROUP BY A.maddh, A.masp, B.masp_nhamay, B.masp_khachhang, B.tensp
	) A LEFT JOIN #DONHANG B ON A.masp = B.item_number


	SELECT A.masp, A.nguyenlieu, SUM(A.m3_tc) AS m3_tc
	INTO #DINHMUC
	FROM (
		SELECT B.masp,
			CASE
				WHEN CHARINDEX(N'THÔNG', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'THÔNG'
				WHEN CHARINDEX(N'CAO SU', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'CAO SU'
				WHEN CHARINDEX(N'DẺ GAI', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'DẺ GAI'
				WHEN CHARINDEX(N'SỒI', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'SỒI'
				WHEN CHARINDEX(N'TRÀM', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'TRÀM'
				WHEN CHARINDEX(N'HỒ ĐÀO', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'HỒ ĐÀO'
				WHEN CHARINDEX(N'BẠCH DƯƠNG', B.nguyenlieu) > 0 THEN N'BẠCH DƯƠNG'
				ELSE B.nguyenlieu
			END AS nguyenlieu, B.m3_tc
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan B WITH(NOLOCK) 
		WHERE COALESCE(B.nguyenlieu, '') NOT IN ('', '0', N'BÊ TÔNG', N'CEMBOARD', N'Nhựa', N'XI MĂNG') AND B.soluong_tc > 0
			AND B.masp IN (SELECT item_number FROM #DONHANG)

	) A GROUP BY A.masp, A.nguyenlieu

	SELECT A.maddh, A.masp, A.masp_khachhang, A.masp_nhamay, A.tensp, A.soluong_po, A.soluong_dathang, C.fsc_name,
		B.nguyenlieu, B.m3_tc, (A.soluong_dathang * b.m3_tc) AS sokhoi_thucte
	FROM #DONDATHANG A
		LEFT JOIN #DINHMUC B ON A.masp = B.masp
		LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc C ON A.fsc_id = C.fsc_id
	ORDER BY A.masp, B.nguyenlieu

	DROP TABLE #DONHANG, #DONDATHANG, #DINHMUC;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.splitwith_multidelimiter","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
